name: House of Commons Library: General election 2024 results
notes: Commons Library publishes constituency-level and candidate-level 2024 result files based on verified official declarations.

name: House of Commons Library: General election results 1918 to 2019
notes: Long-run Westminster results by constituency; pre-1974 geography notes require explicit boundary handling.

name: Democracy Club election data and APIs
notes: Candidate and election API documentation is machine-readable enough for workflow anchoring, but live calls may need credentials; statements of persons nominated remain the promotion gate.

name: Electoral Commission election information API
notes: Run by Democracy Club on behalf of the Electoral Commission; postcode-based and not a substitute for full area marts.

name: Nuffield Elections Unit: Local Elections Archive
notes: High-value historical local election source with candidate names, party labels, votes, rank, elected status, incumbency, and turnout. Use to fill older contests, then still cross-check promotion rows against official council declarations where available.

name: House of Commons Library: Local Elections Handbooks and datasets
notes: Useful for annual local election result coverage and authority-level validation. Keep ward/division boundary generation explicit before joining to current model areas.

name: ONS names and codes for electoral geographies
notes: Use as the canonical code/name register for electoral geographies and to detect same-name areas that changed code after boundary reviews.

name: Local Government Boundary Commission for England: electoral reviews
notes: Use final recommendations, orders, and review dates to version English local wards and county divisions before importing older same-name results.

name: ONS small-area population estimates methodology
notes: Defines output-area best-fit and ward/constituency population estimate methods; essential for population feature confidence.

name: ONS parliamentary constituency mid-year population estimates
notes: Primary ONS dataset page for parliamentary constituency population estimates. Use with explicit boundary-generation checks before attaching to 2024 Westminster constituencies.

name: Nomis parliamentary constituency population estimates API
notes: Fetchable API endpoint for constituency population rows where TYPE460/2010-boundary coverage is appropriate. Do not use as a 2024-boundary source without an explicit ONS/Commons boundary reconciliation.

name: ONS Open Geography Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies July 2024 boundaries
notes: Official 2024 Westminster boundary layer needed for apportioning local-authority asylum data and validating constituency code/name joins.

name: Boundaries Scotland data files
notes: Provides current and historic Scottish local government and Scottish Parliament GIS boundaries.

name: Welsh Government DataMapWales: Senedd constituency boundaries 2026
notes: Official 16-constituency boundary layer for the 2026 closed-list Senedd system.

name: Home Office immigration system statistics: regional and local authority data
notes: Use route-specific quarter-end stock only; do not merge with arrivals, small boats, or wider migration totals.

name: British Polling Council disclosure rules
notes: Use as the minimum metadata standard for polling inputs and any constituency or seat-level polling model outputs.

name: Lancashire 2026 statements of persons nominated source manifest
notes: Local manifest of official council notice URLs extracted from the candidate audit workbook and live-checked with HTTP 200 responses.
